title.en: Traveling Prayers: Tefilat HaDerech and Blessings for Journeys
title.zh: 旅行祈祷：路径之祷（Tefilat HaDerech）与旅程祝福
title.he: תפילות נסיעה: תפילת הדרך וברכות למסעות

description.en: The traveler's prayer, when to say it, and other blessings and customs for safe travel — especially useful for frequent flyers in Asia.
description.zh: 旅行者的祈祷，何时诵读，以及其他安全旅行的祝福和习俗——特别适用于亚洲的常旅客。
description.he: תפילת הנוסע, מתי לאמרה, וברכות ומנהגים אחרים לנסיעה בטוחה - שימושי במיוחד לנוסעים תכופים באסיה.

sources.title: Chabad.org - What You Need to Know About Plane Travel

culturalReferences.context: Chinese travel prayers and temple customs for mountain journeys
culturalReferences.relevance: Parallel traditions of seeking divine protection during travel

culturalReferences.context: Epic journey to India for sacred texts, beginning with elaborate protective ceremonies
culturalReferences.relevance: Universal human practice of ritual preparation for dangerous journeys

culturalReferences.context: Classical Chinese understanding of travel as dual physical-spiritual transformation
culturalReferences.relevance: Cultural parallel to Jewish understanding of journey as sacred passage
